original_snippet_context: General commentary on the financial program presented to Congress by David Campista.
relevant_quote: Queimou-se papel-moeda, restringiram-se as despezas publicas, augmentaram-se as rendas, fez-se economia; começámos a viver uma vida nova; o credito voltou a affagar a nossa probidade...
justification: The mention of burning paper money, restricting public spending, and increasing revenue, alongside the emphasis on regained "probidade" (integrity), suggests an alignment with orthodox principles of fiscal discipline and a "strong" currency.
